segments.text: Skincare is mostly fancy packaging, but
these three products solve actual
problems. First is Nivea's double pump
lotion. Applying a gel and a lotion
separately is annoying, but mixing them
in one bottle ruins the formula. So,
they built a double pump. It pushes both
out at the exact same time without them
touching inside. This is cool, but not
more than this face mask. It comes in a
literal cocktail shaker. You just pour
the sachets in, close the weird
facelits, and shake it up. You get a
perfect face mask with zero mess. This
is clever. But my favorite one is this
plus body wash. Millions of empty
plastic soap bottles end up in ocean. So
it comes packed inside a special wood
pulp wrapper. Drop it on your shower
floor and the water instantly dissolves
it down the drain. There is just zero
trash left behind. For more innovative
designs, subscribe.
